creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2011-05-11 17:15:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt/noc         Makefile distinfo 
    net-mgmt/noc/files   
                         patch-main_management_commands_sync-doc.py 
                         patch-scripts_post-install 
                         patch-scripts_sync-contrib

                         pkg-message.in 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/noc/files   extra-patch-0.6.4.rst 
                         extra-patch-sa_sae.py 
  Log:
  -Update to 0.6.4
  -Changes in port:
  -Change depends of django to django-1.3.x version only
  -Add options for make 'noc' with GMPY and PEP8 modules
  -Remove creating user anf group from pkg-install script and use bsd.port.mk
   mechanism.
  -Autogenerate PLIST file from MANIFEST file in distribution.
  
  PR:             ports/156809
  Submitted by:   Stanislav A Svirid <count@211.ru> (maintainer)
  Approved by:    itetcu (mentor)(implicit)
